description: Reusable prompts, guides, and agent definitions for Claude Code optimization

principles.rule: Never renumber existing directories. The 01-14 numbering is stable and referenced externally.
Do not add executable code files (JS, Python, Ruby, etc.). This is a documentation-only library.
Each directory must have a guide.md as its primary entry point.
Preserve all existing YAML frontmatter fields in skill files and subagent definitions. Do not add or remove fields without intent.
Template placeholders must use square bracket format: [Description], [Step 1]. Never use {{ }}, < >, or other formats.
Maintain the existing Markdown heading hierarchy (H1 → H2 → H3). Do not skip levels.
Update the version header and changelog section in README.md when adding new sections or making significant changes to existing ones.
When adding new content, cross-reference related guides using relative Markdown links.
Include token savings estimates in guides where applicable (e.g., 'Token savings: 60-70%').
Do not create directories with ' 2' suffix duplicates. Existing ones (05-token-optimization 2, etc.) are legacy artifacts.
Do not add emoji to files that do not already use them. Match the existing style of each file.
Note version compatibility where relevant (e.g., 'Compatible with Claude Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5', 'v2.1.32+').
